goal: Review another AI's claimed community-module fixes, verify them against the actual codebase, and report any remaining bugs, regressions, or misleading completion claims.
constraints: Do not modify runtime code in this task; this is a review-only task.
Verify claims against actual file contents and current type/lint diagnostics when relevant.
Focus on the specific fixes claimed in the pasted summary.
deliverables: A concise review report with prioritized findings and concrete follow-up items.
